hotels.name: Hotel Bernstein
hotels.description_fr:
Located high above the Baltic Sea on the island of RÃ¼gen, this hotel offers a large spa and a gourmet restaurant. It has panoramic views stretching from the pier of Sellin across the sea and over to the famous chalk cliffs on the horizon.
Hotel Bernstein's spa is 750 mÂ² in size. It features a pool, sauna and a steam room. There is also a quiet room with sea views.
All rooms at the Bernstein include a private bathroom, bathrobes, a TV and large windows. They feature soft pastel colours and light wooden furniture.
Fish and meat dishes from West Pomerania are served in the hotel restaurant. During the summer you can dine on the terrace overlooking the sea. Drinks can be enjoyed in the Bernsteinlounge.
